basic_details.job_title: GBPUAT Teaching Personnel Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: G. B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology
basic_details.short_information: G. B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology (GBPUAT) Teaching Personnel Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of GBPUAT. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the GBPUAT Teaching Personnel Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D/M.Sc in Agricultural Extension Education or related field, Prior experience of teaching concerned/related subject at College/University level (desirable)
qualification.details: Ph.D/M.Sc in Agricultural Extension Education or related field. Prior experience of teaching concerned/related subject at College/University level is desirable.

salary_details.details: For Ph.D holders: @ Rs. 650/- per hour, maximum Rs. 30000/- per month. For M.Sc holders: @ Rs. 550/- per hour, maximum Rs. 25000/- per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GBPUAT Teaching Personnel Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: GBPUAT Teaching Personnel Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the GBPUAT Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download GBPUAT Teaching Personnel Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Ph.D/M.Sc in Agricultural Extension Education or related field. Prior experience of teaching concerned/related subject at College/University level is desirable.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: For Ph.D holders: @ Rs. 650/- per hour, maximum Rs. 30000/- per month. For M.Sc holders: @ Rs. 550/- per hour, maximum Rs. 25000/- per month.

content_sections.heading: GBPUAT Teaching Personnel Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for GBPUAT Teaching Personnel Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: GBPUAT Teaching Personnel Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GBPUAT Teaching Personnel recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the GBPUAT Teaching Personnel recruitment is 02 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the university by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the selection process for the Teaching Personnel post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Teaching Personnel post at GBPUAT involves an Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates must perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Teaching Personnel position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Teaching Personnel position ranges from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 30,000 per month, depending on the qualification (Ph.D or M.Sc) and hourly rate.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Teaching Personnel role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D or M.Sc degree in Agricultural Extension Education or a related field. Prior teaching experience is desirable.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the GBPUAT Teaching Personnel job?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this GBPUAT Teaching Personnel recruitment is No.CAG/AGC/1455.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Teaching Personnel position at GBPUAT is Contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is GBPUAT located?
faq.answer: G. B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology is located in Pantnagar, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 263145.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxation benefits for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for comprehensive information.
